# Kalman Filtering

**Summary**: An optimal estimation algorithm used to track the state of a system over time by filtering out noise.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2022-algharbi|ALGHARBI, 2022]] applied Kalman Filtering as one of several statistical methods to improve dynamic drilling data quality.
